author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — requires unrestricted access to src/pipeline.rs (FORBIDDEN under current cleanup scope).

**Fix outline:** Extend the ProviderAdapter trait (src/providers/mod.rs) with two new methods: build_streaming_request(&self, model, messages, effort, prompt_blocks) -> Value and stream_response(&self, response, tx) -> TurnResult. Migrate the per-provider logic out of pipeline.rs:210-233 and :506-629 (build_anthropic_request / build_openai_request / build_google_request + the SSE accumulator selection) into each adapter impl. pipeline.rs then becomes thin orchestration: dispatch.build_streaming_request(...) and dispatch.stream_response(...). Proxy.rs already uses this pattern correctly via transform_request_with_thinking and get_headers — pipeline.rs simply needs to follow suit.

**Blocking:** src/pipeline.rs is reserved scope. Defer to a future unrestricted pass.
